author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate templates package runtime and legacy command implementation

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found src/cli/commands/templates.ts and packages/pm-templates/extensions/templates/runtime.ts carry nearly the same template normalization, option parsing, stored-template document parsing, reading, create execution, and list/apply branches. Representative clones include templates.ts:13-89 vs runtime.ts:63-138, templates.ts:89-113 vs runtime.ts:142-166, templates.ts:134-168 vs runtime.ts:180-214, and templates.ts:171-243 vs runtime.ts:211-283. Search found closed extraction item pm-2fgn and open package-first parent pm-59gj, but no active follow-up for this code drift. Fix by making the package runtime call a shared implementation or moving the legacy command to the package-backed runtime path, while preserving standalone package smoke behavior.

Template name normalization, stored-template parsing, create-option mapping, and apply/list execution are single-sourced; src command and package runtime no longer diverge on template semantics; package smoke tests, templates unit tests, and pnpm build pass.

message: Create template duplication finding after duplicate-check search
